# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    protocol: http
    host: users-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - users
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/users
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        path_handling: v1
        regex_priority: 0
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags:
          - production
          - users
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 3000
          hour: 100000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: request-size-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 10
          size_unit: megabytes
          require_content_length: false

  - name: orders-service
    protocol: http
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - orders
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        path_handling: v1
        regex_priority: 0
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags:
          - production
          - orders
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 2000
          hour: 50000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

  - name: inventory-service
    protocol: http
    host: inventory-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - inventory
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/inventory
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        path_handling: v1
        regex_priority: 0
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags:
          - production
          - inventory
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 1500
          hour: 30000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 201
            - 202
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    tags:
      - production
      - users
    targets:
      - target: users-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 201
            - 202
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    tags:
      - production
      - orders
    targets:
      - target: orders-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 201
            - 202
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    tags:
      - production
      - inventory
    targets:
      - target: inventory-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Request-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false
    tags:
      - production
      - global

  - name: request-id
    enabled: true
    config:
      header_name: X-Request-Id
      echo_downstream: true
      generator: uuid
    tags:
      - production
      - global

  - name: correlation-id
    enabled: true
    config:
      header_name: X-Correlation-Id
      generator: uuid#counter
      echo_downstream: true
    tags:
      - production
      - global

  - name: prometheus
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - production
      - monitoring

  - name: file-log
    enabled: true
    config:
      path: /var/log/kong/access.log
      reopen: true
    tags:
      - production
      - logging

  - name: bot-detection
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - production
      - security

  - name: response-transformer
    enabled: true
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - Strict-Transport-Security:max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains
          - X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff
          - X-Frame-Options:DENY
          - Referrer-Policy:no-referrer
    tags:
      - production
      - security

consumers:
  - username: internal-client
    custom_id: internal-client-prod
    tags:
      - production
      - internal

jwt_secrets:
  - consumer: internal-client
    algorithm: HS256
    key: internal-client-key
    secret: replace-with-strong-secret

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Request-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false
    tags:
      - production
      - global

  - name: request-id
    enabled: true
    config:
      header_name: X-Request-Id
      echo_downstream: true
      generator: uuid
    tags:
      - production
      - global

  - name: correlation-id
    enabled: true
    config:
      header_name: X-Correlation-Id
      generator: uuid#counter
      echo_downstream: true
    tags:
      - production
      - global

  - name: prometheus
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - production
      - monitoring

  - name: file-log
    enabled: true
    config:
      path: /var/log/kong/access.log
      reopen: true
    tags:
      - production
      - logging

  - name: bot-detection
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - production
      - security

  - name: response-transformer
    enabled: true
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - Strict-Transport-Security:max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains
          - X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff
          - X-Frame-Options:DENY
          - Referrer-Policy:no-referrer
    tags:
      - production
      - security

  - name: jwt
    enabled: true
    config:
      claims_to_verify:
        - exp
      key_claim_name: iss
      secret_is_base64: false
      run_on_preflight: false
    tags:
      - production
      - auth
